choices.text: Patched conics: series of 2-body problems patched at sphere-of-influence boundaries. Earth-departure 2-body Earth, heliocentric coast 2-body Sun, arrival 2-body destination. Standard JPL technique. Refine with full n-body propagation.

Mars window every 26 months when Earth + Mars alignment allows Hohmann transfer. Miss → wait 2+ years. Voyager 'grand tour' used 175-year planetary alignment. Mission scheduling critical; multi-year prep for launch month.
